targetPhase: v0.14.0 art evidence handoff / v0.15 preparation

items.summary: 请求名在前 400 章未精确命中；同一交易线索可复核到生铁蛊。其本体有煤球状、拳头到弹珠级缩小、黑色多孔、喷出铁气等强外观锚。
ability_hints: used as repair/healing support for Sawtooth Golden Centipede

sourcePointers.summary: 生铁蛊 appears on the same transaction line used by the art request; requested 猪铁蛊 has no exact first-volume hit.
Body evidence: the Gu is described as a coal-lump-like object with size, surface, and texture cues.
Use evidence: activated body emits dark iron-like mist, supporting raw-iron material treatment.
RebornG atlas row marks a visual-gap/name-review prior; original first-volume body evidence is not confirmed here.

notes: compiled by deterministic MiroFish Gu appearance request mapper
candidate-only; requires RebornG intake review before art or atlas use
source summaries are RebornG-owned abstracts and do not contain source body text

notes: 17 request rows delivered; Yang/Yin are represented as one paired row because the request table defines G1 as three rows.
14 rows have first-volume original text pointers; 3 rows remain atlas-prior-only concept placeholders.
atlas-prior-only rows should stay atlas-pending/no-png until RebornG or MiroFish finds stronger evidence.
